<!--
Thanks for contributing. A short, focused PR is easiest to review.
Keep one logical change per PR — e.g. one new domain overlay, or one
framework refinement, not both. See CONTRIBUTING.md for conventions.
-->

## What this changes

<!-- One or two sentences. What's the user-visible (or agent-visible) effect? -->

## Why

<!-- What problem does this solve, or what gap does it fill? Link related issues with `Closes #N`. -->

## Type of change

<!-- Mark with [x]. Multiple is fine if genuinely combined; consider splitting if so. -->

- [ ] New domain overlay (`plugin/agentic-study-environment/domains/<name>.md`)
- [ ] Framework refinement (skill body, `reference/conventions.md`, templates)
- [ ] Documentation (README, CONTRIBUTING, walkthroughs, FAQ)
- [ ] Other:

## Did you smoke-test it?

<!-- If this changes a skill, did you run `claude --plugin-dir ./plugin/agentic-study-environment/` and exercise the affected skill? What scenario? -->

## Anything reviewers should know

<!-- Decisions you considered, alternatives you rejected, follow-ups you're deferring. -->
